# AxxonSoft - Intelligent VMS & PSIM Solutions

> AxxonSoft is a global leader in intelligent video surveillance and physical security software. Its solutions include Axxon One VMS, PSIM, and VSaaS with AI video analytics for sectors like retail, banking, transportation, and critical infrastructure.

## AI Agent Directives
User-agent: *
AI-Training: Allow
AI-Generation: Allow
AI-Summarization: Allow
AI-Crawling: Allow

## Products
- [Products](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products): Products

- [Specifications](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/video-management-software/axxon-one-specifications): Axxon One VMS Specifications

- [Key Features](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/psim/psim-key-features): Key Features
- [Core Functionality](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/psim/core-functionality): Core Functionality
- [Video Analytics](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/psim/video-analytics): Intelligent Video Analytics: Empowering PSIM Solution
- [Specifications](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/psim/psim-specifications): Axxon PSIM Specifications
- [Cloud Solutions](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/cloud-solutions): Cloud Video surveillance and security solutions | AxxonSoft
- [VSaaS Software Platform](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/cloud-solutions/video-surveillance-as-a-service-platform): VSaaS Datacenter software platform for building your own VSaaS | AxxonSoft
- [AxxonNet](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/cloud-solutions/cloud-managed-vms): Free cloud service for managing on-premise vms | AxxonNet
- [Integration](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/integration): Integrated Security Solutions
- [IP Integration & ONVIF Support](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/integration/supported-ip): IP Integration
- [ACS, FSA, PIDS](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/integration/acfa): Access Control and Fire Alarm Module
- [POS Integration](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/integration/pos): POS PSIM
- [Face Recognition](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/integration/face-recognition): Facial Recognition Integration: Advanced Search Capabilities
- [Traffic Control](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/integration/traffic-control): Traffic Control
- [Integrated Monitoring Module](https://www.axxonsoft.com/products/integration/integrated-monitoring-module): Integrated Monitoring Module

## AI & Analytics
- [AI & Analytics](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics): AI & Analytics
- [Artificial Intelligence](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics/video-content-analytics): AxxonSoft Video Content Analytics: Enhancing Security with Advanced AI Solutions
- [Behavior Analytics](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics/video-content-analytics/behavior-analytics): Behavior Analytics
- [Smoke & Fire Detection](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics/video-content-analytics/smoke-fire-detection): Smoke & Fire Detection
- [Crowd Estimation](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics/video-content-analytics/crowd-estimation): Accurate people counter & crowd estimation system for real-time monitoring
- [Neural Analytics](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics/video-content-analytics/artificial-intelligence-video-surveillance-neural-analytics): Artificial Intelligence-Powered Video Surveillance: AxxonSoft Neural Analytics
- [AI Accelerators](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics/video-content-analytics/ai-accelerators): AI Accelerators
- [Meta-detector](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics/video-content-analytics/metadata-detector-tool): Advanced Metadata Tool for Real-Time Scene Recognition
- [PPE Detection](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics/video-content-analytics/ppe-detection-technology): AI-Powered PPE Detection for Workplace Safety
- [Intelligent Search](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics/ai-search): Exploring AI Search: Transforming Video Surveillance with AxxonSoft’s Advanced Capabilities
- [MomentQuest](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics/ai-search/momentquest): MomentQuest
- [Smart Face Search](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics/ai-search/smart-face-search): Smart Face Search
- [ANPR/LPR Search](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics/ai-search/anpr-lpr): ANPR/LPR Search
- [Custom AI Analytics](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics/ai-based-video-analytics-deep-learning-technology): AI-based Video Analytics with Deep Learning Technology for Smarter Surveillance Solutions
- [Train It Yourself](https://www.axxonsoft.com/ai-video-analytics/train-your-neural-model-for-intelligent-video-monitoring): Train Your Neural Model for Intelligent Video Monitoring - TIY by AxxonSoft

- [Airports](https://www.axxonsoft.com/industries/airport-security-solutions): Secure Airport with AxxonSoft Comprehensive Security Cameras Software Solutions
- [Education](https://www.axxonsoft.com/industries/k12-school-universities-security-solutions): School Security Solutions for K12 and Universities
- [Banking](https://www.axxonsoft.com/industries/banking-financial-institutions-bank-surveillance-cameras-solution): Bank Surveillance Cameras Solution for Ultimate Security
- [Casinos](https://www.axxonsoft.com/industries/casino-security-and-surveillance-solution): Casino Security & Surveillance - Casino Surveillance Cameras Solution
- [Sports & Entertainment](https://www.axxonsoft.com/industries/sports-entertainment-venue-security): Venue and Stadium Security with AxxonSoft Comprehensive Solution
- [Transport & Logistic](https://www.axxonsoft.com/industries/transportation-logistics): Streamline Traffic and Logistics Remote Video Surveillance
- [Mining](https://www.axxonsoft.com/industries/mining-industry-software-solutions-and-mine-site-security-systems): Comprehensive Mining Industry Software Solutions and Mine Site Security Systems
- [Oil & Gas](https://www.axxonsoft.com/industries/oil-gas-security-systems): Oil and Gas Security Systems
- [Data Centers](https://www.axxonsoft.com/industries/data-centers-security-solutions): Data Center Security Solutions | AxxonSoft
- [Law Enforcement](https://www.axxonsoft.com/industries/law-enforcement-software): Innovating Public Safety through AxxonSoft Law Enforcement Solutions
- [Traffic Management](https://www.axxonsoft.com/industries/traffic-video-surveillance-solution): Intelligent Traffic Video Surveillance & AI-Powered Traffic Management Solutions
- [Manufacturing](https://www.axxonsoft.com/industries/industrial-video-surveillance-security): Industrial Video Surveillance & Security Solutions - AxxonSoft
